pages.title: Relax
pages.excerpt: Trails, landscapes, and quiet moments near Segarelli.
pages.content:
Terme di Sassetta

Terme di Sassetta is a natural wellness center, deeply connected to Tuscany and to the fruits of its land and woods.

It is 36.7 km from our agriturismo. To get there, you will drive through the local woods, right in the heart of the geothermal area.

When staying with us, you can also enjoy a discount on admission to the thermal baths.

Driving directions Agriturismo Segarelli - Terme di Sassetta
